assumptions.execution_model: 24/7 multi-agent with human shift approvals every 12h

tasks.description: Replace insecure Clerk role endpoint pattern with verified webhook + authenticated onboarding role API.
acceptance_criteria: Onboarding uses authenticated internal API, not webhook path
Role updates cannot be spoofed by unauthenticated callers
tasks.technical_approach: Introduce dedicated `/api/users/role` route guarded by `requireAuth`; keep webhook route limited to Clerk events with signature verification and event schema validation.
tasks.validation_method: Integration tests for unauthorized role-change attempts + signed webhook acceptance path.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires Clerk webhook secret configuration.

tasks.description: Enforce private Blob access and signed URL retrieval for all uploaded documents and reports.
acceptance_criteria: Signed URLs expire and are ownership-validated
Public direct access to sensitive files is blocked
tasks.technical_approach: Switch Blob access mode, add signed URL helper with TTL, and resolve file access through authenticated server routes.
tasks.validation_method: Attempt unauthenticated URL access should fail; authenticated signed URL works within TTL only.
tasks.risks_blockers: May require document metadata normalization first for robust ownership checks.

tasks.description: Add resource ownership checks to all document/comparable routes.
acceptance_criteria: Ownership checks are covered by tests
tasks.technical_approach: Add lookup helpers for resource-to-appraisal mapping and enforce `requireAppraisalOwnership` before mutate/read operations.
tasks.validation_method: Integration tests with two users and shared IDs to confirm denial paths.
tasks.risks_blockers: Needs stable document/comparable ID relation model.

tasks.description: Fix broken wizard/report routing to use `/dashboard/appraisals/*` consistently.
acceptance_criteria: No router.push target points to invalid `/appraisals/*` paths
Step transitions and preview routes resolve correctly
tasks.technical_approach: Introduce centralized route builder utility and replace hardcoded strings.
tasks.validation_method: E2E wizard navigation smoke test.
tasks.risks_blockers: None.

tasks.description: Unify document extraction API/UI contract and persist extraction-ready document metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Step4 sends documentUrl + documentType expected by API
Extraction response maps to form fields deterministically
tasks.technical_approach: Store uploaded document metadata in appraisal/document model and call extraction using canonical URL/type payload.
tasks.validation_method: Upload + extract flow test across repair estimate and insurance docs.
tasks.risks_blockers: Will surface downstream type/schema mismatches requiring follow-up fixes.

tasks.description: Generate and commit baseline Drizzle migrations, including missing indexes.
acceptance_criteria: Migration directory exists and is committed
Fresh DB can migrate from zero state
tasks.technical_approach: Define missing index declarations, generate migrations, validate up/down strategy in staging.
tasks.validation_method: Run migration on empty DB and verify schema parity checks.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires stable DB URL in env.

tasks.description: Add rate limiting and abuse protection on sensitive API routes.
acceptance_criteria: Rate limits exist for auth-adjacent, upload, extraction, checkout, webhook endpoints
tasks.technical_approach: Implement middleware/route-level limiter with per-user/IP buckets and configurable thresholds.
tasks.validation_method: Synthetic burst tests confirm throttling behavior.
tasks.risks_blockers: May require Redis/edge store selection.

tasks.description: Repair wizard state management so each step persists and auto-save works with real changes.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-save writes actual delta state every 30s
Resume from saved draft restores all step data
tasks.technical_approach: Move to normalized form state contract with typed per-step adapters and controlled components.
tasks.validation_method: E2E save/refresh/resume scenario across 8 steps.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires alignment of JSON shapes with DB schema.

tasks.description: Create baseline automated test harness (unit + integration) for security and core workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Test runner configured in package scripts
Calculation and extraction contract tests implemented
tasks.technical_approach: Adopt Vitest + API integration harness; seed deterministic fixtures.
tasks.validation_method: CI test command passes and fails on intentional regressions.
tasks.risks_blockers: Needs test DB strategy.

tasks.description: Implement full 14-section React-PDF appraisal report pipeline per `.agent` spec.
acceptance_criteria: Report meets minimum content depth and includes legal sections
tasks.technical_approach: Split PDF into composable section components with strict typed input assembler.
tasks.validation_method: Golden PDF regression checks and manual legal-content review.
tasks.risks_blockers: Needs finalized narrative and citation engines.

tasks.description: Implement narrative engines (repair analysis, market stigma, severity justification insertion).
acceptance_criteria: Narrative modules generate deterministic text from appraisal data
State-law and severity narratives match source rules
tasks.technical_approach: Use typed template functions with explicit rule-based branching from master schema.
tasks.validation_method: Snapshot tests for GA/NC/default and severity levels 1-5.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires clear editorial baseline from SNAPCLAIM sample.

tasks.description: Implement VIN decode integration and equipment enrichment.
acceptance_criteria: Decoded fields populate and remain user-editable
Failures degrade gracefully to manual entry
tasks.technical_approach: Add server-side VIN decode proxy and normalization layer.
tasks.validation_method: Unit tests for VIN parsing + integration tests for decode success/failure.
tasks.risks_blockers: External VIN API reliability.

tasks.description: Implement normalized document metadata model and full document-library features.
acceptance_criteria: Deleting removes Blob object and DB reference
tasks.technical_approach: Add documents table linked to appraisal/user and backfill existing URL fields.
tasks.validation_method: Integration tests for upload->preview->delete lifecycle.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires migration and data backfill strategy.

tasks.description: Harden comparables search with production actor, retries, and min-count expansion logic.
acceptance_criteria: Apify actor ID configurable and non-placeholder
tasks.technical_approach: Implement resilient search loop with bounded retries and fallback controls.
tasks.validation_method: Mocked API tests proving min/max comp behavior and timeout handling.
tasks.risks_blockers: Apify usage cost controls must be tuned.

tasks.description: Finalize valuation output correctness (including dvPercentOfRepair) and validation.
tasks.technical_approach: Use strict DTOs + guard clauses and derive repair-percent from accident details.
tasks.validation_method: Unit + property tests for constants, median, and percentage outputs.
tasks.risks_blockers: Dependent on clean input data model.

tasks.description: Implement missing appraisal management actions: duplicate, archive, share, bulk download.
acceptance_criteria: Archive is soft delete and hidden by default
Bulk download returns zip of selected reports
tasks.technical_approach: Add action routes with ownership checks and background zip generation for bulk downloads.
tasks.validation_method: E2E tests for each action and permission checks.
tasks.risks_blockers: Bulk download may require async job queue.

tasks.description: Complete document template engine with all required templates and placeholder substitution guarantees.
tasks.technical_approach: Introduce shared template renderer with strict key coverage checks and fallback values.
tasks.validation_method: Snapshot tests per template + placeholder scan assertions.
tasks.risks_blockers: Legal copy review needed for jurisdiction language.

tasks.description: Add DOCX export pipeline for templates.
acceptance_criteria: Template endpoint can return DOCX for supported types
tasks.technical_approach: Use `docx` package with template->doc conversion service.
tasks.validation_method: Generated DOCX opens in Word/Google Docs without corruption.
tasks.risks_blockers: Formatting parity with PDF templates may require iteration.

tasks.description: Implement RBAC enforcement across API and UI capability surfaces.
tasks.technical_approach: Introduce permission helpers per role and central route guards.
tasks.validation_method: Role-based integration tests across individual/appraiser/attorney/body_shop/admin.
tasks.risks_blockers: Business policy confirmation required for final entitlement matrix.

tasks.description: Fix payment env model, entitlement updates, and webhook idempotency/role mapping.
tasks.technical_approach: Normalize env names, add event dedupe store, and explicit entitlement state machine.
tasks.validation_method: Stripe webhook replay tests and checkout integration tests.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires Stripe test fixtures and webhook secrets.

tasks.description: Complete SendGrid workflows: welcome, payment confirmation, renewal reminders, failed payment alerts.
acceptance_criteria: All required email types send via templates
Events are triggered from payment/user lifecycle
tasks.technical_approach: Create event-driven email dispatcher with template map and retryable send jobs.
tasks.validation_method: Email integration tests with mocked SendGrid and event fixtures.
tasks.risks_blockers: Production sender domain verification needed.

tasks.description: Implement professional role feature surfaces (appraiser USPAP/signature, attorney team management, body shop white-label controls).
acceptance_criteria: Role-specific UI modules are available and secured
USPAP fields render for appraisers only
tasks.technical_approach: Add modular feature flags by role and extend profile/data schema for role-specific settings.
tasks.validation_method: Role matrix E2E tests.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires policy decisions on attorney team model.

tasks.description: Implement advanced before/after image comparison logic for requirement-level completeness.
tasks.technical_approach: Batch image handling with deterministic prompt framing and output normalization.
tasks.validation_method: Fixture-based image extraction regression suite.
tasks.risks_blockers: Model variability requires robust parsing fallback.

tasks.description: Build educational resources and negotiation guidance module.
acceptance_criteria: Resources pages exist and are navigable
tasks.technical_approach: Static content modules with markdown-driven topic taxonomy.
tasks.validation_method: Content QA checklist and route smoke tests.
tasks.risks_blockers: Legal review recommended before publication.

tasks.description: Performance tuning pass for API hotspots, comparables search latency, and PDF generation throughput.
acceptance_criteria: Comparable search under 15s target in test environment
PDF generation under 45s for representative sample
tasks.technical_approach: Add timed instrumentation, optimize query/data transforms, and parallelize heavy operations where safe.
tasks.validation_method: Benchmark script reports and tracked p95 metrics.
tasks.risks_blockers: External API variability can skew benchmarks.

tasks.description: Deliver full test coverage pack (unit + integration + E2E + browser automation for critical flows).
tasks.technical_approach: Add Playwright-based browser suite with deterministic fixtures and parallel shards.
tasks.validation_method: CI runs full matrix with artifact capture on failures.
tasks.risks_blockers: Needs stable seeded environment.

tasks.description: Run security hardening sweep (OWASP-focused) and remediate findings.
tasks.technical_approach: Automate threat checklist and targeted negative tests for high-risk endpoints.
tasks.validation_method: Security regression report with pass/fail evidence.
tasks.risks_blockers: Potential late-breaking P0 findings.

tasks.description: Implement bundle/performance budgets and alerts.
tasks.technical_approach: Add analysis tooling and enforce thresholds in pipeline.
tasks.validation_method: Intentional regression triggers failing check.
tasks.risks_blockers: Threshold calibration needed.

tasks.description: Produce operational runbooks (deploy, rollback, migration, incident response, key rotation).
acceptance_criteria: On-call playbook includes critical failure paths
External service setup docs are complete
tasks.technical_approach: Codify release and recovery procedures aligned with tested workflows.
tasks.validation_method: Tabletop exercise using runbook steps.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires final architecture stabilization.

tasks.description: Execute production-readiness launch rehearsal with synthetic user journeys.
acceptance_criteria: All launch blockers closed or accepted with waiver
Go-live checklist signed by human overseer
tasks.technical_approach: Run scripted end-to-end rehearsal in staging and capture artifacts/screenshots.
tasks.validation_method: Launch rehearsal report with timestamps, logs, and pass/fail matrix.
tasks.risks_blockers: Requires stable staging credentials and external service quotas.
